title: leptorkis reflexa
intro: Leptorkis reflexa, also known as the Yellow Pith or Yellow Pith Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Leptorkis reflexa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
